instruction: I need to respond to an email about 'Meeting notes'. Find it in my inbox and send this reply: 'Great, let me follow up on this shortly.'.

public.subject: Meeting notes
public.reply_body: Great, let me follow up on this shortly.

solution_commands: email reply --id email_seed_1 --body 'Great, let me follow up on this shortly.'

params.reply_body: Great, let me follow up on this shortly.
